description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cute brown and white dog with large, expressive eyes and floppy ears. The toy features a rounded head with a white snout, a black nose, and a pink tongue sticking out, giving it a friendly and playful appearance. Its body is predominantly brown with a white belly and paws, and it has a fluffy, bushy tail with a white tip. The toy's limbs are short and rounded, contributing to its cuddly and approachable look. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the stitching is visible along the seams. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A soft, plush brown and white dog stuffed toy with large eyes, floppy ears, and a fluffy tail. It has a friendly face with a pink tongue and a cuddly, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's large eyes, white snout, pink tongue, and both floppy ears clearly, with its front paws visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the snout, one floppy ear, and the fluffy tail, with the body and limbs in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both ears, the brown body, and the bushy white-tipped tail.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other profile of the snout, one eye, one ear, and the fluffy tail, similar to the left side but mirrored.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and cheerful, with wide, open eyes and a small smile formed by the pink tongue sticking out. The overall look is inviting and playful.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on its hind legs with front paws slightly raised and head facing forward.
